subject_information.address: 230 Tiffany Mountain Suite 863, South Michael, KY 25205

suspicious_activity.narrative: Michael Stanley (CUST_0062), a medium-risk customer, exhibited suspicious activity indicative of structuring throughout 2025. Stanley conducted varied transactions across multiple accounts, including significant wire transfers on 2025-07-27 and 2025-07-29. The varied transaction methods and locations may suggest an attempt to avoid detection.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: The customer has multiple active accounts with high average monthly balances. The transactions are varied in nature and method, which could indicate an attempt to avoid detection by structuring transactions. The customer's medium risk rating also raises concerns.
